title: HapAttend Clocking in Machine - Fingerprint Clock in Machine for Employees Small Business Automatic Calculate Hours, Standalone Card Scanner Attendance Time Clock with 5 RFID Cards (0 Monthly Fees)
features: Multi-Language Support: Our device supports English, Spanish, German, French, and Italian. Easily switch to your preferred language for everyday use. If you need a user manual in another language, please feel free to contact us via email.
Easy to Use: Get started quickly, reduced the learning curve. It will show you step-by-step how to set up the clocking in machine on YouTube within 5 minutes.
No Monthly Fees.: Fingerprint clockin machine works right out of the box with no complicated network configuration, no software to install, and no monthly fees.
Standalone Use: In order to protect data privacy, HapAttend clocking in machine prohibits internet connection, and data can be transmitted through USB flash drive.
Auto And Accurate Hours Calculations: No need to spend time calculating hours by hand, working hours are totaled automatically. Say goodbye to costly paper cards, messy ink ribbons.
Auto Punch: In Auto Punch Mode, the card scanner updates automatically to prevent employees from forgetting to punch in and out.

Perfect for Small Business: The clocking in machine is widely used in workplaces, including offices, factories, hotels, schools, restaurants, etc, and is ideal for small and mid-sized businesses with a maximum of 1000 employees.

Previous page 12/24 hours Time Format Default 0 AM Need change the Day Cut Off Time Set the time on which the day is changed to the next day lifetime Customer Support Rest easy knowing that you'll have support whenever you need it. Next page 1 No Monthly Subscription 2 Support Daylight Saving 3 Support Overnight Work 4 Mass Data Storage 5 Support Specification Identification Fingerprint, RFID ＆ Password User Up to 1000 Fingerprint Up to 1000 RFID Card Up to 1000 Record Up to 10000 Remote Access No WIFI ＆ Internet USB USB 2.0 (Include) Power Supply AC 5V 1A Operating Temp 0°C - 45°C, Indoor use only Operating Humidity 20%-80% Dimensions 6.3*5.1*1.3 (inch) What's In The Box 1*Clocking in Machine 1*USB 5*RFID Cards 1*User Maual 1*Charger 1*Mounting Accessories How to change the year? You can use the “up” or “down” keys to adjust the month and date. The year will update automatically as the month changes. Can I clock in and out numerious times during the day? Yes, unlimited times. Whether to support overnight shift and how to set up？ Sure, just need to change the Day Cut Off Time. Consider set to 3 am,If the user clock out before 3 am,the total working hours will be counted as the previous day working hour. If after 3 am, the hours until clock out will be counted as the next day. Are there any additional charges? The fingerprint time clock works right out of the box with no complicated network configuration, no software to install, and no monthly fees. How many RFID CARDS does it come with and can i order extra cards? It comes with 5, you can buy more in our store
